Frank Kern
The Building Blocks Of All Ad
Campaigns
Regardless Of Platform
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 7 --

What We’re Applying This Stuff To
(A Fancy Way Of Saying “Here’s What I’m Going To Be Teaching You)
• Facebook
• Instagram
• YouTube
• Google Adwords (Minimally)
• Display (Banners and stuff)
• Omnichannel Retargeting
• LinkedIn
• Snapchat
• Twitter
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 7 --

All we’re talking about is showing a
combination of the right words and the right
images …to the right people …at the right
time.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

The Main Things
Here’s What Makes The World Go ‘Round
• 	The offer. (People gotta want what you’re selling).
• 	The “after-click” experience (your sales process, funnel, etc.)
• 	The creative. (Fancy way of saying the ad itself.)
• 	The audience. (Who you show it to)
• 	The campaign objective. (What you’re telling the platform to do)
• 	The BID STRATEGY. (How you’re telling the platform to do it.)
• 	The Media Strategy (How Everything Fits Together)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

The Campaign Objective
What You’re Telling The Platform To Do
• 	Video Views
• 	Pageviews
• 	Clicks/Website Visits
• 	Engagement
• 	Leads (in the context of Facebook Lead Form ads)
• 	Offers (in the context of “coupons” that can be redeemed at a local
business.
• 	CONVERSIONS.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

The BID STRATEGY
Stuff 	Nobody Really Talks About That Can Make You A Fortune
• 	Max Conversions
• 	CPA (Cost per action - usually used on Google/Youtube)
• 	Minimum ROAS
• 	Cost Cap
• 	Bid Cap
• 	CPM
• 	CPV
www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 7 --

The Media Strategy
How Everything Fits Together
• 	Facebook and/or YouTube: Primary Top of Funnel (Conversion Ads)
• 	Facebook and YouTube: Primary Retargeting (Conversion Ads)
• 	Display (Banners And Stuff): Secondary Retargeting (Conversion Ads
or Traffic Objective)
• 	Omnichannel: “Icing On The Cake” Retargeting (Conversion Ads or
Click Objective)
• 	Branding (Content Videos Etc): “Icing On The Cake” (Video Views
Objective or Click Objective)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 7 --
